{{CargoRelic
|name=Time Crystal
|class_id=20351
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The time crystal has more than four dimensions, always retaining a non-equilibrium state within its surroundings, and has an active space-time cycle. It can break timeline symmetry and change state according to temporal movement, but will ultimately resume its original shape, circling around just like a hand on a clock. Moreover, since it's in a state similar to perpetual motion, when the crystal is at its lowest energy point, energy is conserved within so as to not violate the law of conservation.
|fame=14
|art=16
|fth=16
|civ=15
|tech=29
|ss1=Wormhole Refinement SPD +2%<br>Per 5 Wormhole Refines, Snail ATK +1<br>Wormhole Refines: 200/200
|ss2=Wormhole Refinement SPD +4%<br>Per 5 Wormhole Refines, Snail ATK +2<br>Wormhole Refines: 200/200
|ss3=Wormhole Refinement SPD +6%<br>Per 5 Wormhole Refines, Snail ATK +3<br>Wormhole Refines: 200/200
|ss4=Wormhole Refinement SPD +6%<br>Per 5 Wormhole Refines, Snail ATK +3<br>Wormhole Refines: 200/200
|ss7=Wormhole Refinement SPD +6%<br>Per 5 Wormhole Refines, Snail ATK +3<br>Wormhole Refines: 200/200<br> (Awakened)
}}
